free_text: Neutron capture reaction cross-section data
processing and resonance parameter analysis of 197Au
based on white light neutron source
State Key Laboratory of Particle Detection
and Electronics, Beijing
Huaneng Shandong Shidao Bay Nuclear Power
Co.Ltd, Rongcheng
The Back-n white neutron source at
China Spallation Neutron Source (CSNS)
Neutrons were produced via the spallation
reactions by bombarding a massive tungsten target
with a 1.6 GeV proton beam, operating at a 25 Hz
repetition rate.
Natrual Au sample with diameter of 40 mm, thickness of
0.2 mm and density of 19.32 g/cm3
A Gamma Total Absorption Facility (GTAF),
which consists of 28 hexagonal BaF2 crystals and 12
pentagonal BaF2 crystals to form a spherical shell
with an external diameter of 25 cm and an internal
diameter of 10 cm, covering 95.2% of the solid angles.
A flight path about 75.9 m.
Discrimination between gamma rays generated in
the background and alpha decay of Ra in BaF2.
The data received from Luo Hao-Tian
Compiled by Liu Yangyang (CNDC)
No information
Data presented by author
